summary: SINGLE_FOCUS simplicial homology of triangulated annulus. 8 BLUE outer + 8 GREEN inner vertices; 32 edges progressively revealed (ring + cross + diagonal) via ValueTracker step_tr, then 16 triangular faces (YELLOW→ORANGE). Live V=16, E=32, F=16 ⇒ V-E+F=0 matching β_0-β_1=1-1=0 for annulus.
